extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the sprint after POGAČAR Tadej doubled his GC lead to four seconds by contesting intermediate sprint bonuses against sprinters.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR sprinted intermediate bonuses on flat stage holding only 2-second GC lead, prioritizing margin over energy conservation.
KUKRLE Michael went solo from break with 17km remaining, gaining 2.5-minute advantage before peloton swallowed him late.
GANNA Filippo chased throughout despite big mountain effort previous day, UAE sacrificing domestique freshness to defend narrow GC.
STRAKHOV Dmitry dominated intermediate sprint classification with 41 points versus PHILIPSEN's 14, breakaways controlling secondary competitions.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: confident enough to contest intermediate sprint bonuses personally while defending minimal GC advantage on crosswind stage
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: recovered extraordinarily well from mountain domestique duties to chase repeatedly on flat crosswind stage
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: second sprint win plus intermediate sprint points, dominating sprinting opportunities while 10th in time trial
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: mechanical late in stage after suffering on Jebel Jais mountain stage, disengaged from sprint contention
rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: negative: disengaged from own team again, pattern of isolation continuing from earlier stages
rider_signals.KUKRLE Michael: positive: solo attack from break held 2.5-minute gap with 17km remaining, tactical aggression nearly succeeded
